quality.rationale: 基于正交曲线坐标系标架量的标准算符推导，逻辑链条清晰且方法高度通用，但缺乏具体天体或场论物理背景。

origin.answer:
$\nabla \cdot \underline{\mathbf{A}} = \left(r^2 \sin \theta\right)^{-1} \left[ \left(r^2 \sin \theta A_r\right)_{,r} + \left(r \sin \theta A_\theta\right)_{,\theta} + (r A_\phi)_{,\phi} \right]$
$(\nabla \times \mathbf{A})^r = (r \sin \theta)^{-1} \left[ (\sin \theta A_\phi)_{,\theta} - A_{\theta,\phi} \]$
$(\nabla \times \mathbf{A})^\theta = (r \sin \theta)^{-1} \left[ A_{r,\phi} - (r \sin \theta A_\phi)_{,r} \]$
$(\nabla \times \mathbf{A})^\phi = r^{-1} \left[ (r A_\theta)_{,r} - A_{r,\theta} \]$
origin.solution:
Solution 8.23. We use results (ii) and (iii) of Problem 8.22 with $\mathbf{x}^1 = \mathbf{r}$ , $\mathbf{x}^2 = 	heta$ , $\mathbf{x}^3 = \phi$ and with $\mathbf{h}_1 = \mathbf{l}$ , $\mathbf{h}_2 = \mathbf{r}$ , $\mathbf{h}_3 = \mathbf{r}$ sin $	heta$ . (For simplicity we follow the usual notation here and omit the caret's indicating physical components.)
$$
\begin{array}{l} \nabla \cdot \underline {{\mathbf {A}}} = (\mathrm {r}^{2} \sin \theta)^{- 1} [ \mathrm {r}^{2} \sin \theta \mathrm {h}_{\mathrm {i}}^{- 1} \mathrm {A}_{\mathrm {i}} ]_{, \mathrm {i}} \\\\= \left(\mathrm {r}^{2} \sin \theta\right)^{- 1} \left[ \left(\mathrm {r}^{2} \sin \theta \mathrm {A}_{\mathrm {r}}\right), \mathrm {r} + \left(\mathrm {r} \sin \theta \mathrm {A}_{\theta}\right), \theta + \mathrm {r A}_{\phi}, \phi \right] \\\\ \end{array}
$$
$$
\begin{array}{l} (\nabla \times \mathbf {A})^{\mathbf {r}} = (\mathbf {r} \sin \theta)^{- 1} [ (\sin \theta \mathbf {A}_{\phi}), \theta - \mathbf {A}_{\theta , \phi} ] \\\\ (\nabla \times \mathbf {A})^{\theta} = (\mathbf {r} \sin \theta)^{- 1} [ \mathbf {A}_{\mathbf {r},\phi} - (\mathbf {r} \sin \theta \mathbf {A}_{\phi}),_{\mathbf {r}} ] \\\\ (\nabla \times \mathbf {A})^{\phi} = \mathbf {r}^{- 1} \left[ (\mathbf {r A}_{\theta})_{,\mathbf {r}} - \mathbf {A}_{\mathbf {r}, \theta} \right]. \\\\ \end{array}
$$
